message:
chore(audit): record batch 433 (remaining files + oracle idempotency)

Audited 6 remaining high-value files: time/sleep.rs, service/reconnect.rs,
obligation/session_types.rs, obligation/no_leak_proof.rs, evidence.rs,
observability/otel.rs — all SOUND.

Verified oracle idempotency: checked all 8 oracles for duplicate-event
state erasure (the pattern fixed in finalizer.rs and loser_drain.rs).
All safe — either using HashSet (idempotent) or entry() API (preserves
existing), or explicitly hardened (region_tree.rs).

Grand total: 39 bugs fixed, 280+ files audited, ~325K+ lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
